Name: 10 Second Ninja X
Description: 10 SECOND NINJA X is a shockingly fast, overwhelmingly intense action/puzzle game. In this thumb blistering sequel, the nefarious Captain Greatbeard has kidnapped you and trapped your forest friends inside of his army of robots like some kind of psychopath. Destroy all of Greatbeard's robots in each level in ten seconds or less. Be fast enough to get the coveted three star rating in each. Fight through 100 levels, explore Greatbeard's airship, discover secrets, climb the leaderboards and show everyone what it means to be THE FASTEST, COOLEST HERO EVER.
Tags: 2D, 2D Platformer, Action, Arcade, Casual, Difficult, Fast-Paced, Indie, Ninja, Platformer, Precision Platformer, Puzzle, Puzzle Platformer, Side Scroller, Singleplayer, Time Attack

Name: 100% Orange Juice
Description: 100% Orange Juice is a digital multiplayer board game populated by developer Orange Juice's all-star cast. Characters from Flying Red Barrel, QP Shooting, Suguri and Sora come together to duke it out with dice. Playable by up to 4 players online with 4 Single-player campaigns available.
Genres: Card & Board Game, Indie, Strategy, Turn-based strategy (TBS)
Tags: 2D, Anime, Board Game, Card Game, Casual, Comedy, Co-op, Cute, Difficult, Family Friendly, Female Protagonist, Funny, Indie, Multiplayer, Singleplayer, Strategy, Turn-Based

Name: Stardew Valley
Description: You've inherited your grandfather's old farm plot in Stardew Valley. Armed with hand-me-down tools and a few coins, you will begin your new life. Plant crops, tend to animals, explore mines, fish, cook, craft, marry someone and have a family, and uncover the mysteries of this magical place.
Tags: Charming, Cozy, Crafting, Cute, Exploration, Farming, Indie, Pixel Graphics, Relaxing, RPG, Sandbox, Singleplayer, Wholesome

Name: Castle Crashers
Description: Castle Crashers is a side-scrolling beat em up game where you play as one of four knights with unique weapons and magical powers. Battle through 8 worlds, fight hordes of enemies, collect pet animals, and defeat epic boss monsters in this indie classic.
Genres: Adventure, Hack and slash/Beat 'em up, Indie
Tags: 2D, 4 Player Local, Action, Adventure, Arcade, Couch Co-op, Cute, Hand-drawn, Indie, Local Co-op, Pixel Graphics, Singleplayer

Name: Elden Ring
Description: Rise, Tarnished, and let grace guide thee. In the Lands Between, a demigod has shattered the Elden Ring. With the help of your allies, embark on a quest to claim the Elden Ring and become the Elden Lord. A new open-world fantasy adventure awaits.
Tags: Action RPG, Atmospheric, Challenging, Dark Fantasy, Exploration, Medieval, Open World, Souls-like, Story Rich
